RAMSLAB Research on Advanced Mechanical Systems

Imagine, Build, Automate: Pioneering the Next Era of Industrial Robotics and Simulation

ProjectsPeoplePublicationsAbout
University of Pavia
Laboratory
Imagine, Build, Automate: Pioneering the Next Era of Industrial Robotics and Simulation

Welcome to RAMS lab! Our aim is to bring innovation and creativity to industrial and research applications using cutting-edge robotics and dynamic simulators. Our team of researchers is dedicated to advancing the field of robotics and simulators in order to revolutionize the way industries operate. We are constantly exploring new ways to apply this technology to enhance productivity, improve safety, and reduce costs.

One of our main focuses is on developing simulators for sports and driving. Our state-of-the-art simulators are designed to provide athletes and drivers with a realistic training experience, allowing them to improve their skills and performance in a safe and controlled environment. These simulators are also a valuable tool for medical researches, as they can be used to analyze and optimize performances of people who need rehabilitation in a controlled environment.

In addition to our work in simulators, we also specialize in robotics for industrial applications. Our team is constantly developing new robotic applications that can be used in a wide range of industries, from manufacturing and logistics to healthcare and agriculture. Our goal is to make these systems more efficient, reliable, and cost-effective, so that they can be widely adopted and make a significant impact on the industries they serve.
